creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Jul 21 05:21:34 2013
New Revision: 323367
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323367

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.0
  - Trim header
  - Pet portlit (a bit)
  
  PR:		ports/180469
  Submitted by:	lwhsu

Modified:
  head/textproc/augeas/Makefile
  head/textproc/augeas/distinfo
  head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug
  head/textproc/augeas/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/textproc/augeas/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/Makefile	Sun Jul 21 04:58:51 2013	(r323366)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/Makefile	Sun Jul 21 05:21:34 2013	(r323367)
@@ -1,29 +1,24 @@
-# vim: ts=8 sw=8
-# Ports collection makefile for:  textproc/augeas
-# Date created:			  19 May 2010
-# Whom:				  Russell Jackson <raj@csub.edu>
-#
+# Created by: Russell Jackson <raj@csub.edu>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	augeas
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
-#PORTREVISION=	0
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.0
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.augeas.net/
 
 MAINTAINER=	swills@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	A configuration editing tool
 
+TEST_DEPENDS=	bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bash \
+		gsed:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gsed
+
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_GNOME=	pkgconfig libxml2
+USE_GNOME=	libxml2
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf aclocal autoheader automake libtool
 ACLOCAL_ARGS=	-I . -I gnulib/m4 -I ${LOCALBASE}/share/aclocal
 AUTOMAKE_ARGS=	--add-missing
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
-
-TEST_DEPENDS=	bash:${PORTSDIR}/shells/bash \
-		gsed:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gsed
+USE_PKGCONFIG=	yes
 
 MAN1=		augparse.1 augtool.1
 MANCOMPRESSED=	no

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/distinfo	Sun Jul 21 04:58:51 2013	(r323366)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/distinfo	Sun Jul 21 05:21:34 2013	(r323367)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 31bf757c5b8197765946b3805f3793c32b03cd92a7a77ec95d37e71a1f131912
-SIZE (augeas-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 1880630
+SHA256 (augeas-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 9d81e4228329e2d5cccb018ab06bc8b734fb2dede2c4d9b5c02303d4a690b76b
+SIZE (augeas-1.1.0.tar.gz) = 1940928

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	Sun Jul 21 04:58:51 2013	(r323366)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/files/patch-lenses__shellvars.aug	Sun Jul 21 05:21:34 2013	(r323367)
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
---- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2012-12-17 16:39:45.000000000 -0500
-+++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2013-05-13 19:34:17.538347901 -0400
+--- lenses/shellvars.aug.orig	2013-06-15 04:39:33.000000000 +0800
++++ lenses/shellvars.aug	2013-07-11 22:06:44.821259529 +0800
 @@ -18,7 +18,7 @@
    let eol = del (/[ \t]+|[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
    let semicol_eol = del (/[ \t]*[;\n]/ . empty_part_re*) "\n"
  
--  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
+-  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - ("unset" | "export")
 +  let key_re = /[A-Za-z0-9_.]+(\[[0-9]+\])?/ - "unset" - "export"
    let matching_re = "${!" . key_re . /[\*@]\}/
    let eq = Util.del_str "="
  
-@@ -201,7 +201,8 @@
+@@ -200,7 +200,8 @@
    let filter_default = incl "/etc/default/*"
                       . excl "/etc/default/grub_installdevice*"
                       . excl "/etc/default/whoopsie"
@@ -19,11 +19,11 @@
                       . incl "/etc/cron-apt/config"
                       . incl "/etc/environment"
                       . incl "/etc/blkid.conf"
-@@ -213,6 +214,7 @@
+@@ -212,6 +213,7 @@
                       . incl "/etc/lintianrc"
                       . incl "/etc/lsb-release"
                       . incl "/etc/os-release"
 +                     . incl "/etc/periodic.conf"
                       . incl "/etc/popularity-contest.conf"
                       . incl "/etc/rc.conf"
-                      . incl "/etc/selinux/config"
+                      . incl "/etc/rc.conf.local"

Modified: head/textproc/augeas/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/augeas/pkg-descr	Sun Jul 21 04:58:51 2013	(r323366)
+++ head/textproc/augeas/pkg-descr	Sun Jul 21 05:21:34 2013	(r323367)
@@ -1,3 +1,5 @@
 Augeas is a configuration editing tool. It parses configuration files in their
 native formats and transforms them into a tree. Configuration changes are made
 by manipulating this tree and saving it back into native config files.
+
+WWW: http://augeas.net/
